      "text": "Jo nieveenam vihſ reu lau-

"

    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tazzija Juhdite us

tawaß Kalpones/ un lai tawa

nam Kungam tchinni Nakti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ja tu tawaß Kalpones

mi welſi ne ißdohfeß.
"

    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tik teefcham ka tas

"

    {

eſſi/no warrenas Sapraſchanas/

Karra Leetahm.
"

    {

      "text": "Un nu/ tahß Wallodas
